supported_devices: Chillers, heaters, fans, air conditioners, compressors, irrigation pumps, and any mains-powered device with a compatible plug
port_types: 2x AC outlet (100-240V, 50/60Hz, 15A shared total), 24V DC power input
ai_notes: Platform-wide ML automation engine; AI Agronomist uses image recognition and NLP for plant health diagnosis, pest and disease detection (photo and voice input); weekly AI Climate Summary email reports. AI features require cloud connectivity. Free tier available for AI Agronomist per manufacturer.
compatible_ec_fans: any fan with a compatible mains plug (on/off control only, no speed regulation)
compatible_lights: any mains-powered light fixture with compatible plug (on/off and schedule only)
compatible_humidifiers: any humidifier with compatible mains plug
compatible_irrigation: any irrigation pump with compatible mains plug
compatible_co2_equipment: any CO2 device with compatible mains plug
recommended_use_note: Commercial grow room automated switching for mains-powered devices. On/off and scheduling only — not for fan speed or light dimming. Part of scalable GrowDirector 3 PRO modular ecosystem.
uvp_notes: Price found on GrowDirector official shop page, excl. tax, USD. Available in regional socket variants: Type B (US), Type E (French), Type F (Schuko/EU), Type G (UK) — verify Type F availability for German market.
notes: Part of GrowDirector 3 PRO modular ecosystem. Made in Israel. Available in Type B, Type E, Type F (Schuko), and Type G socket variants — order correct variant for German market. 15A is total shared across both outlets. Up to 32,000 devices networkable in series. System maintains local automation when internet unavailable; full remote access requires internet. Not sold on Amazon.de.
